---
title: Technial Books 2016
---

Started a bit late with the idea, so currently it is still work in progress. 

symbol | meaning 
------ | -------
{o\_o} | do read
{\^\_\^} | did read
{x\_x} | will not read anymore

- {o_o} 
<span style="color:#1C86EE">
A. Brabazon, M. O'Neil, S. McGarraghy (2015): **Natural Computing Algorithms**
</span>
- {o_o} 
<span style="color:orange">
V. Yevjevich (1972): **Probability and Statistics in Hydrology**
</span>

```{r, echo = FALSE}
  require(visNetwork, quietly = TRUE)

  nodes <- data.frame(id = c(1, 2, 3, 4), 
                      label = c("1 Aug.","21 Aug.","8 Aug.","21 Aug."),
                      group = c("NCA","NCA","PSH","PSH"), 
                      level = c(1,3,2,3))
  
  edges <- data.frame(from = c(1, 3),
                      to = c(2, 4))
  #
  visNetwork(nodes, edges, width = "100%") %>% 
    visEdges(arrows = "to") %>% 
    visGroups(groupname = "NCA", color = "#1C86EE") %>%
    visGroups(groupname = "PSH", color = "orange") %>% 
    visHierarchicalLayout() 
```
